scripts.db:create-db: npx wrangler d1 execute algavive-db --local --command="SELECT 1;" --config wrangler.dev.toml
scripts.db:execute: npx wrangler d1 execute algavive-db --local --file=src/generated/execute.sql --config wrangler.dev.toml
scripts.db:execute-schema: npx wrangler d1 execute algavive-db --local --file=src/generated/execute-schema.sql --config wrangler.dev.toml
scripts.db:make: make & npx wrangler d1 execute algavive-db --local --file=src/generated/execute.sql --config wrangler.dev.toml
scripts.db:production:execute: npx wrangler d1 execute algavive-db --remote --file=src/generated/execute.sql --config wrangler.prod.toml
scripts.db:production:export-schema: npx wrangler d1 export algavive-db --remote --output=src/generated/schema-production.sql --no-data --config wrangler.prod.toml
